text: Golden-signal relevant metrics SHOULD be captured before and after major changes.
title: Telemetry Contract

text: Verification output SHOULD distinguish blocking and advisory defects.
title: Structured Operational Logging

text: AAL-0 and AAL-1 work MUST receive independent review.
title: Independent Review Required

text: Items lacking code, tests, evidence, or roadmap update MUST remain PARTIAL.
title: Items lacking code, tests, evidence, or roadmap update MUST remain PARTIAL

text: Baseline version changes MUST be explicit and auditable.
title: Baseline version changes MUST be explicit and auditable

text: Blocking enforcement MUST happen in runtime gates, not prompt prose alone.
title: Runtime Enforcement Over Prompt Prose

text: All code-modifying workflows MUST pass through a unified hook bus.
title: Unified Hook Bus

text: Legacy orchestration paths MUST remain compatibility adapters only.
title: Legacy Paths As Adapters

text: Rule loading MUST be machine-readable and deterministic.
title: Machine Readable Rule Loading

text: Prompt contracts MUST expose required governance keys and freshness-safe references.
title: Prompt Contracts Are Provenance Only

text: Visual governance packs MUST include aes_visuals/v1 and aes_visuals/v2 directives manifests.
title: Visual Governance Packs Present

text: Visual governance packs MUST remain model-readable JSON objects with typed directives.
title: Visual Governance Packs Valid

text: High-assurance work MUST preserve requirement-to-verification trace links.
title: Traceability Ledger Required

text: AAL-0 and AAL-1 completion MUST include a valid evidence bundle.
title: Evidence Bundle Required

text: Waivers MUST be bounded, time-limited, and include compensating controls.
title: Waivers Must Be Valid

text: Root-cause fixes MUST be preferred over masking behavior.
title: Root Cause Fixes Over Masking

text: Bare exception swallowing MUST NOT be used.
title: No Bare Except

text: Fallback paths MUST NOT silently bypass required verification.
title: No Silent Verification Bypass

text: Risk-bearing functions SHOULD stay within bounded complexity.
title: Complexity Bound

text: Public interfaces SHOULD declare error contracts and failure modes.
title: Public Error Contract

text: Silent None returns in exception paths SHOULD be treated as suspect.
title: Suspicious None Return

text: Hardcoded secrets MUST NOT be committed (SVL baseline).
title: No Hardcoded Secrets

text: Security-sensitive paths MUST mitigate CWE Top 25 classes in SVL workflows.
title: Security Sensitive Paths Hardened

text: Exposed surfaces and dependencies MUST include threat-model and provenance markers.
title: Threat Model And Provenance Markers

text: Dependency baselines MUST be explicit and auditable.
title: Explicit Dependency Pins

text: Pinned dependencies MUST include integrity hash metadata.
title: Dependency Hashes Required

text: Release workflows MUST contain provenance/attestation signals.
title: Provenance Markers Required

text: Release workflows MUST include artifact-signing controls.
title: Signing Markers Required

text: Native high-performance paths MUST document SIMD and OpenMP assumptions.
title: Manual Cpp Safety Review

text: High-risk kernels MUST keep scalar or reference validation paths.
title: No Using Namespace Std In Headers

text: High-risk native code MUST avoid raw allocation patterns without RAII ownership.
title: Raii Required

text: Error-bearing native return paths SHOULD use [[nodiscard]] contracts.
title: Nodiscard Error Returns

text: C-style casts SHOULD NOT appear in high-assurance C++ code paths.
title: No C Style Casts

text: Public Python APIs SHOULD carry type hints.
title: Public APIs Typed

text: Imports SHOULD be deterministic and ordered.
title: Ruff Baseline

text: Mutable default arguments SHOULD NOT be used.
title: No Mutable Defaults

text: Dynamic execution MUST NOT be used outside explicitly sandboxed environments.
title: No Dynamic Execution

text: Wildcard imports MUST NOT be used in governed Python code.
title: No Wildcard Imports

text: File operations MUST use context managers in governed Python code.
title: Context Managed File Access

text: Parallel constructs SHOULD make scheduling and reduction assumptions explicit.
title: OpenMP Parallel Regions Tagged

text: Alignment-sensitive SIMD code SHOULD declare alignment intent.
title: Alignment Contracts

text: OpenMP parallel regions SHOULD declare explicit data or scheduling clauses.
title: Explicit OpenMP Clauses

text: SIMD kernels SHOULD provide a scalar or reference oracle.
title: Scalar Oracle Exists

text: Training loops MUST check for non-finite gradients before optimizer updates.
title: Finite Gradient Gate

text: Unstable numerics MUST be guarded with stable formulations.
title: Stable Numerics

text: Data ingest boundaries SHOULD validate schema, shape, and dtype.
title: Data Validation

text: Training configuration SHOULD record seeds and versioning.
title: Reproducibility Manifest

text: Simulation cores SHOULD monitor conservation-sensitive quantities.
title: Conservation Monitors

text: Hamiltonian systems SHOULD avoid non-symplectic integrator markers.
title: Symplectic Integrator

text: Parameterized circuits SHOULD avoid magic-angle literals in gate construction.
title: No Magic Angles

text: Noisy simulations SHOULD specify a noise model explicitly.
title: Noise Model Present

text: Backend execution SHOULD follow explicit compilation or transpilation.
title: Transpilation Required

text: Shot count SHOULD meet minimum confidence thresholds.
title: Shot Sufficiency

text: Agents MUST surface their assurance context during non-trivial implementation work.
title: Compliance Context Persisted

text: Prompt guidance is advisory; runtime policy is authoritative.
title: Chronicle Gate

text: Hook receipts and verification evidence SHOULD be retained for audit.
title: Runtime Gate Completion
